elements.title: lang::report_page_011_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT DISTINCT kbi_u.id                                     AS userid,
                kbi_u.firstname,
                kbi_u.lastname,
                kbi_u.email,
                coo.cohortname                           AS cohorts,
                kbi_ue.timecreated,
                kbi_u.lastlogin,
                kbi_lit.firstaccess,
                kbi_ul.timeaccess                            AS lastaccess,
                m.modules,
                kbi_cmc.completed,
                kbi_cc1.timecompleted                        as course_completion,
                kbi_c.id                                     AS course_id,
                kbi_c.fullname                               AS course_name,
                (SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname)
                 FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                        JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
                        JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                 WHERE kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id
                   AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                   AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
                 LIMIT 1)                                AS teacher
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.courseid = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ch.userid, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT kbi_coh.name SEPARATOR ', ') as cohortname
                  FROM mdl_cohort kbi_coh
                         JOIN mdl_cohort_members kbi_ch ON kbi_ch.cohortid = kbi_coh.id
                  GROUP BY kbi_ch.userid) coo ON coo.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc1 ON kbi_cc1.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_cc1.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, COUNT(kbi_cm.id) AS modules
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
                  WHERE kbi_cm.deletioninprogress = 0
                    AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course) m ON m.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid, COUNT(kbi_cmc.id) AS completed
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm, mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc
                  WHERE kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
                    AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
                    AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid) cmc ON kbi_cmc.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit ON kbi_lit.page = 'course' AND kbi_lit.param = kbi_c.id AND kbi_lit.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ul ON kbi_ul.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ul.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ue.status = 0
  AND kbi_e.status = 0
  AND (kbi_ul.timeaccess < (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() - 2592000) OR kbi_ul.timeaccess IS NULL)
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_c.id, kbi_u.firstname, kbi_u.lastname, kbi_u.email, cohorts, kbi_ue.timecreated,
         kbi_u.lastlogin, kbi_lit.firstaccess, kbi_ul.timeaccess, m.modules, kbi_cmc.completed, course_completion, course_id,
         course_name, teacher
